from sqlmodel import Session, SQLModel, Field, create_engine, select
from typing import Optional


class User(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    name: str
    status: str


engine = create_engine("postgresql://user:pass@localhost/mydb")


def update_user_statuses(user_ids: list[int], new_status: str) -> None:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        for user_id in user_ids:
            user = session.get(User, user_id)
            user.status = new_status
            session.commit()


def deactivate_users(user_ids: list[int]) -> int:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        count = 0
        for user_id in user_ids:
            user = session.get(User, user_id)
            user.active = False
            session.commit()
            count += 1
        return count


def rename_users(renames: list[dict]) -> None:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        for rename in renames:
            user = session.get(User, rename["user_id"])
            user.name = rename["new_name"]
            session.commit()
